title: Shark Totem
description: A custom shark-like totem inspired by Foolish Gamers. Originally a bigger mod made by druidbird on PMC for 1.16.5
body:
This is a tinsy little resource pack that changes the texture of the Totem of Undying to its old texture but as a shark, inspired by Foolish Gamers' minecraft character.

I found this as apart of a slightly larger mod by [druidbird on Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/foolish-gamers-totems/), which I wanted to get working on 1.21 for my own worlds. I decided to remove the sounds from their mod, and post what I changed (for ease of use). Go check out their mod too!

To install, unzip the file and drag the folder it creates to your resourcepacks folder in your minecraft folder. Then in your in-game options, enable the resource pack (you can look it up if you dont know how).
